chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 03 of 2021 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.01 2. For orders on CMA No.80/2021 3. For hearing of main case 4. For orders on CMA No.81/2021 29.01.2026 Mr. Aamir Ali Shaikh, advocate for the applicant Office objection states that the reference is time-barred. Learned counsel states that the observation is correct and that no application under Section 5 of Limitation Act, 1908, has been preferred. In view hereof, this reference is dismissed on account of being time-barred. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad
